Grok 4.3

New

grok-4.3 For everything except code, audio, image, and video. Context 1 million tokens Input $1.25 / 1M tokens Output $6.00 / 1M tokens

Voice API

Real-time conversations, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech. Agent $3.00 / hour TTS $15.00 / 1M chars STT (Batch) $0.10 / hour

Which model should I choose?

Your choice depends on your use case. Grok models have aliases like grok-4.20 in the alias table below.
